title: Set admin credentials, add user logo to header/footer

requirements.text: Update the hardcoded admin credentials in the backend adminLogin function to use email 'hiteshmodi2007@gmail.com' and password 'Hitesh1234@'.

quotes: my email is hiteshmodi2007@gmail.com and set password Hitesh1234@

acceptanceCriteria: Calling adminLogin('hiteshmodi2007@gmail.com', 'Hitesh1234@') returns a successful/truthy result
Calling adminLogin with any other email/password combination returns a failure/falsy result
The admin panel login page at /admin accepts these credentials and redirects to /admin/dashboard on success

requirements.text: In the Header component, display the user's uploaded logo image (user-logo.dim_200x60.png from frontend/public/assets/generated/) to the LEFT of the existing Trusted Cars wordmark/logo. Both logos must appear side by side. Do not remove or replace the existing Trusted Cars logo — only add the user's logo on its left. Apply the same change in the Footer component.

quotes: dont remove your logo it is also looking nice only add my logo at left hand side of yours

acceptanceCriteria: The user's logo image appears to the left of the existing Trusted Cars logo in the sticky header
The user's logo image appears to the left of the existing Trusted Cars logo in the footer
The existing Trusted Cars wordmark/logo is still visible and not removed
Both logos are properly aligned vertically and spaced on desktop and mobile
On mobile, both logos scale appropriately and fit within the header without overflow

constraints: Do not remove or replace the existing Trusted Cars logo in the header or footer
Do not link the /admin route in any public navigation
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Adding any new pages or sections
Changing the overall site design or color scheme
Modifying any car listing or booking functionality
